subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory beseemeth them that are nigh unto God, who rejoice in the hope of attainment unto His presence and are quickened by the promise of His meeting [3.5s]... ...Since the dominions of the hearts and souls of men are completely unable to grasp the nature of the peerless Essence, it behoveth us to give praise to His First Creation, to His First Remembrance
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا مقربین را لایق و سزا که بامید قرب مسرورند و برجای لقا زنده
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
